description: Activate Go tests with CDK assertions, uncomment and verify baseline test in cdk-base_test.go passes against the empty stack
steps: Uncomment the test code in cdk-base_test.go, but modify it to test for the actual empty stack (it currently asserts an SQS queue which doesn't exist). Replace the SQS assertion with a simple assertion that the stack synthesizes without error, e.g., use template.ToJSON() != nil or assertions.Template_FromStack and assert ResourceCountIs for any resource type is 0 or just that the template can be created.
Run GONOSUMCHECK='*' GOPROXY=direct go test -v ./... to confirm the test passes.
acceptance_criteria: cdk-base_test.go contains an uncommented, passing test that validates the stack synthesizes
Running 'go test -v ./...' shows at least one PASS result
findings: NODE_OPTIONS must also be unset (NODE_OPTIONS='') when running go test, not just cdk commands. The jsii runtime spawns a Node.js child process which fails if the proxy-bootstrap.js preload is set. Full test command: NODE_OPTIONS='' GONOSUMCHECK='*' GOPROXY=direct go test -v ./...
